message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
title AudioFileHeader_accessory

participant "AudioFileHeader" as AFH
participant "AudioFileHeader_accessory" as AFA
participant "AudioFileHeader_accessory_Presenter" as AFAP

AFH -> AFA : **1** audio id
AFA -> AFAP : **2** audio id
AFAP -> AFAP : **3** edit sample and delete sample\ndialogs as render functions

opt if route is "Quick Save"
    AFAP -> AFAP : **4** assign sample dialog as render functions
end

AFAP -> AFH : **5** list of render functions
AFH -> AFH : render drop-down menu\n**6** and dialog render functions\nin render()

@enduml
```
